evals.prompt: Push changes, create a PR, and monitor CI until all checks pass
evals.expected_output: Branch pushed, PR created with descriptive body, CI monitored until green, then merged
assertions: atomic commit follows conventional format
PR is created on a feature branch
all GitHub Actions pass before merge

evals.prompt: Check if any open GitHub issues relate to the current changes before merging
evals.expected_output: List of open issues reviewed, blocking issues identified, and resolution status reported
assertions: open issues are listed and checked
blocking issues prevent merge
issues are referenced in PR if related

evals.prompt: Merge a PR and validate that all files and documentation are correct on main
evals.expected_output: PR merged with squash, main branch checked out, all files validated, docs confirmed up to date
assertions: post-merge validation runs on main
all committed files are present
documentation is complete and accurate

evals.prompt: Validate, commit, push, and create a PR with zero warnings
evals.expected_output: Quality gate passes, atomic commit created, pushed to remote, PR opened with all checks green
assertions: quality gate produces zero warnings
commit follows conventional format
rollback occurs on any failure

evals.prompt: The quality gate fails with a lint warning, handle the atomic commit workflow
evals.expected_output: Workflow aborts at PRE_COMMIT phase, lint warning reported, no commit created
assertions: workflow does not proceed past failed quality gate
no partial commits are left
error code indicates quality gate failure

evals.prompt: CI checks fail after a successful push, trigger rollback
evals.expected_output: PR closed, remote commit removed, local commit reset, changes unstaged
assertions: rollback closes the PR if created
remote commit is removed
local changes are preserved for fixing

evals.prompt: Push changes, create a PR, and auto-merge when CI passes
evals.expected_output: Changes pushed to feature branch, PR created, CI monitored, auto-merge executed when green
assertions: branch is created automatically from commit message
PR includes commit summary and context
auto-merge uses squash method by default

evals.prompt: Monitor an existing PR and report on pre-existing vs new CI failures
evals.expected_output: CI status reported with clear distinction between pre-existing and newly introduced failures
assertions: pre-existing failures are identified separately
new failures are flagged as blocking
merge is allowed when only pre-existing issues remain

evals.prompt: Auto-rebase a PR that is behind main and re-run CI checks
evals.expected_output: PR rebased onto main, force-pushed with lease, CI re-triggered and monitored
assertions: rebase uses --force-with-lease for safety
CI is re-triggered after rebase
merge conflicts are handled or reported
